        {"aspect": "art_style", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "colored graphics, like a Commodore 64 game"},
        {"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "spectacular... agradable 8-bit sound"},
        {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "not large, perhaps, as were the classic side action games"},

        {"aspect": "art_style", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "1980's style and charm"},

        {"aspect": "ai_behavior", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "an NPC... refused dialog"}

    {"idx": 21, "aspects": [
        {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Fun game, very much a sequel to Wasteland 2"},
        {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Visually quite good"},
        {"aspect": "voice_acting", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Almost all dialogue has quality voice over"},
        {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The story is good"},
        {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "The game is a bit short"},
        {"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "you can end up with a real hard end game"},
        {"aspect": "balance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "some cookie cutter OP builds"},
        {"aspect": "combat", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "there is very little actual strategy in combat"},
        {"aspect": "dlc", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Steeltown DLC adds some crappy new stacking status effects"},
        {"aspect": "dlc", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Cult of the holy detonation DLC seems to be a bit lacking in stuff to do"},
        {"aspect": "writing", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the writing is very poor"},
        {"aspect": "player_choice", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "there's never any way to change any outcome"},
        {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Kinda wish there was more content and quests"},
        {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Some of the characters in the game are quite wild"},
        {"aspect": "exploration", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "most quests and places you come across are pretty interesting"}
    ]},
